title: Chinese Translation for Valhelsia Structures
description: The Chinese translation texturepack work for Valhelsia Structures
body:
Unofficial translations for the mod [Valhelsia Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/valhelsia-structures)
# Translating
The official Chinese translation for [Valhelsia Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/valhelsia-structures) is out of verion for a long time. So this resoursepack was created, dedicated to providing a better localized experience for Valhelsia Structures mod players from China.This resource pack can be included in your modpack releases as long as the author is credited.
# Notes
- Delayed Updates: The translation was done by me alone in my spare time, so updates may not be made immediately when the mod is updated. Once it's ready for basic use, I will release a preview version here in time.
- Community Support: There may be shortcomings in my translation, and some errors might occur. Feel free to contact me directly via email(heyue2334@gmail.com).
# Original Author and Thanks
The author of the [Valhelsia Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/valhelsia-structures) mod is [Khytwel](https://modrinth.com/user/Khytwel), and the original mod can be found on Modrinth. A big thank you to the author for creating such amazing content.
